title: QSMS user creates a Rework case with multiple items
description: This verifies that a QSMS user can complete the Add Case workflow, add multiple product lines in one case, submit it, and see the new Rework case in Overall.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Fill in the case details for the first item
Add another item to the same case
Fill in the case details for the second item
Verify the new Rework case is listed in Overall
Verify the submitted case details are available for review

title: QSMS user logs in and sees all permitted areas
description: This verifies that a QSMS user can sign in with a PIN and reach the main app with access to all QSMS-permitted navigation areas.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Verify the main application page is displayed
Verify all QSMS-permitted tabs are visible

title: WFG user logs in and sees allowed navigation
description: This verifies that a WFG user can sign in with a PIN and reach the main app with only the WFG-allowed areas available.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Verify the main application page is displayed
Verify the WFG-allowed tabs are visible

title: Finance user logs in and sees only Overall
description: This verifies that a Finance user can sign in with a PIN and reach the main app with only Overall navigation available.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Verify the main application page is displayed
Verify only the Overall tab is visible

title: WFG user creates and reviews a Rework case
description: This verifies that a WFG user can create a Rework case from Add Case and then review the saved case in Overall.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Fill in the case details for a valid Rework case
Verify the submitted Rework case is listed in Overall
Verify the case details can be reviewed from the list

title: User reviews existing Rework cases in Overall
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open Overall and review existing Rework case list data.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Verify existing Rework cases are listed
Verify case summary data is available for review

title: Finance user cannot access restricted tabs
description: This verifies that a Finance user can only navigate to Overall and cannot reach restricted tabs from the main app.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Verify only the Overall tab is visible
Verify restricted tabs are not available

title: User is blocked by an incorrect PIN
description: This verifies that entering the wrong PIN prevents access and shows a login failure message.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with an incorrect 6-digit PIN
Verify a login failure message is visible
Verify the main application page is not displayed

title: User sees validation when Batch No. is invalid
description: This verifies that an Add Case form with a non-numeric Batch No. shows validation feedback and keeps the user on the form.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Fill in the case details with a non-numeric Batch No.
Verify a validation error for Batch No. is visible
Verify the user remains on the Add Case form

title: User is blocked by an invalid profile selection
description: This verifies that choosing an invalid profile prevents access and shows a login failure message.

steps.description: Fill in the PIN field with a valid 6-digit PIN
Verify a login failure message is visible
Verify the main application page is not displayed
